commands.review_summary:
The PR extends QA Lab so `qa suite --scenario <id>` can route markdown scenarios with `execution.kind: vitest` or `playwright` to test-file runners that emit `qa-evidence.json`, reports, logs, docs, and Control UI Playwright scenario metadata.

PR surface: Source +653, Tests +558, Docs +27. Total +1238 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a QA Lab scenario execution capability rather than reporting a current-main bug. The PR body and latest CI provide feature verification evidence instead of a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; the latest head cleared the earlier typecheck findings and should proceed through normal maintainer review.

target.title: Run Vitest and Playwright scenarios from qa suite
target.body:
## Summary
- let `qa suite --scenario <scenario-id>` dispatch markdown scenarios by `execution.kind: vitest` or `execution.kind: playwright`
- add separate Vitest and Playwright scenario runners that emit the existing structured `qa-evidence.json` format through the #91484 evidence builders
- keep qa evidence summary schema at v2; the v2 schema was not consumed by a shipped path yet, so this PR extends it in place
- add a Control UI Playwright scenario that links `ui.control` coverage to `ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/playwright-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/vitest-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-command-runner.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/playwright-scenario-runner.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/playwright-scenario-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/vitest-scenario-runner.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/vitest-scenario-runner.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --model mock-openai/gpt-5.5 --scenario control-ui-chat-flow-playwright --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/scenario-control-ui-proof`
- `git diff --check`

Real behavior proof: `qa suite --scenario control-ui-chat-flow-playwright` wrote `.artifacts/qa-e2e/scenario-control-ui-proof/qa-playwright-report.md` and `.artifacts/qa-e2e/scenario-control-ui-proof/qa-evidence.json`; the evidence entry was schema v2, `test.kind: playwright-test`, `test.id: control-ui-chat-flow-playwright`, runner `playwright`, primary coverage `ui.control`, status `pass`.
target.author: romneyda
